since_last: 48% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.24%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -2.76% · Gold -2.47% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 48% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.24%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.24%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +15.55%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +15.55%, QCOM +9.47%, LRCX +7.99%, AMAT +7.70%, TER +6.66%. Laggards: BBAI -6.63%, MDB -5.91%, AVAV -4.41%, AI -3.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.41% at $153.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.41% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
